channel.title: Riyadh on DevOps Saudi | Platform Engineering & DevOps Consulting Riyadh
channel.description: Recent content in Riyadh on DevOps Saudi | Platform Engineering & DevOps Consulting Riyadh

item.title: DevOps Staff Augmentation in Riyadh: The Iqama Problem and How Augmentation Solves It
item.description: Senior DevOps engineers in Riyadh are scarce and expensive. Iqama takes 8-12 weeks. Nitaqat ratios add complexity. Here’s the real cost comparison between hiring and staff augmentation in Saudi Arabia.
